description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Coverage tab today shows declared bindings + raw verification entries but no actual coverage status per requirement. The Verifier already computes a claim strength (claimed / linked / executed) for each verification × requirement pair and reports it in verifier_report['verification']['claims']. Surface that per requirement in the Coverage tab with a strength badge and the list of verifications that cover it.
title: Polish v7: per-requirement claim strength in Coverage tab
